# Kommunal- og distriktsdepartementet

*28 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Ikrafttredelse | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| [Lov om Husbanken](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-05-29-30.md) | Husbankloven | 2010-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-05-29-30.md) |
| [Lov om Sametinget og andre samiske rettsforhold (sameloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.md) | Sameloven – samel | 1989-02-24 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1987-06-12-56.md) |
| [Lov om burettslag (burettslagslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.md) | Burettslagslova – brl | 2004-01-01, 2004-03-01, 2005-08-15, 2006-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-06-06-39.md) |
| [Lov om bustadbyggjelag (bustadbyggjelagslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.md) | Bustadbyggjelagslova – bbl | 2005-08-15, 2004-01-01, 2004-03-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-06-06-38.md) |
| [Lov om bustøtte og kommunale bustadtilskot (bustøttelova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2012-08-24-64.md) | Bustøttelova | 2013-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2012-08-24-64.md) |
| [Lov om eierseksjoner (eierseksjonsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-65.md) | Eierseksjonsloven – eiersl | 2018-01-01, 2018-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-65.md) |
| [Lov om eigedomsregistrering (matrikkellova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-17-101.md) | Matrikkellova | 2010-01-01, 2007-02-09, 2009-02-27, 2022-01-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-17-101.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i lov om interkommunale selskaper (møteoffentlegheit, økonomifo](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-06-02-22.md) | Endringslov til lov om interkommunale selskaper | 2023-07-01, 2024-01-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-06-02-22.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i burettslagslova og eierseksjonsloven (tilrettelegging for bol](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-19-114.md) | Endringslov til burettslagslova og eierseksjonsloven (tilrettelegging for boligkjøpsmodeller) | 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-19-114.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i husleieloven (omorganisering av Husleietvistutvalget)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-127.md) | Endringslov til husleieloven | 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-127.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i partiloven (innberetning og offentliggjøring av bidrag fra ba](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-94.md) | Endringslov til partiloven | 2025-07-01, 2026-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-94.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i plan- og bygningsloven og matrikkellova (nye virkemidler ved ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-20-93.md) | Endringslov til plan- og bygningsloven og matrikkellova | 2025-07-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-93.md) |
| [Lov om fastsetjing og endring av kommune- og fylkesgrenser (inndelingslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.md) | Inndelingslova | 2002-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2001-06-15-70.md) |
| [Lov om flagging på kommunenes offentlige bygninger](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.md) | Lov om flagging på kommunale bygninger | 1933-06-29 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1933-06-29-2.md) |
| [Lov om forsøk i offentlig forvaltning (forsøksloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.md) | Forsøksloven | 1993-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-06-26-87.md) |
| [Lov om husleieavtaler (husleieloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.md) | Husleieloven – husll | 2000-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-03-26-17.md) |
| [Lov om informasjonstilgang mv. for Kommisjonen for å granske fornorskingspolitik](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2020-05-12-41.md) | Lov om informasjonstilgang (fornorskingspolitikk) | 2020-05-12 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-05-12-41.md) |
| [Lov om infrastruktur for geografisk informasjon (geodataloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2010-09-03-56.md) | Geodataloven | 2010-09-03, 2012-05-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2010-09-03-56.md) |
| [Lov om interkommunale selskaper (IKS-loven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.md) | IKS-loven | 2000-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-01-29-6.md) |
| [Lov om kommunal forkjøpsrett til leiegårder](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.md) | Lov om kommunal forkjøpsrett til leiegårder | 1977-04-29 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1977-04-29-34.md) |
| [Lov om kommunenes ansvar på det boligsosiale feltet [boligsosialloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2022-12-20-121.md) | Boligsosialloven | 2023-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-12-20-121.md) |
| [Lov om kommuner og fylkeskommuner (kommuneloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2018-06-22-83.md) | Kommuneloven | 2019-11-01, 2020-01-01, 2019-10-03, 2021-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-06-22-83.md) |
| [Lov om omdanning av Noregs Kommunalbank til aksjeselskap](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.md) | Lov om Kommunalbanken AS – Kombl | 1999-11-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1999-07-16-68.md) |
| [Lov om planlegging og byggesaksbehandling (plan- og bygningsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2008-06-27-71.md) | Plan- og bygningsloven – pbl | 2009-07-01, 2010-07-01, 2013-01-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2008-06-27-71.md) |
| [Lov om registrering av regjeringsmedlemmers, statssekretærers og politiske rådgi](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2012-11-30-70.md) | Lov om registrering av verv og økonomiske interesser | 2012-11-30 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2012-11-30-70.md) |
| [Lov om regulering av byggje- og anleggsverksemd](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.md) | Lov om regulering av byggje- og anleggsverksemd | 1996-03-22 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1996-03-22-16.md) |
| [Lov om valg til Stortinget, fylkesting og kommunestyrer (valgloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2023-06-16-62.md) | Valgloven | 2024-05-01, Kongen bestemmer | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-06-16-62.md) |
| [Lov om visse forhold vedrørende de politiske partiene (partiloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2005-06-17-102.md) | Partiloven | 2006-01-01, 2005-07-01 | [git log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-17-102.md) |
